节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides methods to operate or manage Bluetooth.

Obtains the Bluetooth status of a device. {@link BluetoothState#STATE_TURNING_ON}, {@link BluetoothState#STATE_ON}, {@link BluetoothState#STATE_TURNING_OFF}, {@link BluetoothState#STATE_BLE_TURNING_ON}, {@link BluetoothState#STATE_BLE_ON}, or {@link BluetoothState#STATE_BLE_TURNING_OFF}.
注释信息: @returns { BluetoothState } Returns the Bluetooth status, which can be {@link BluetoothState#STATE_OFF},
节点.return_description: Returns the Bluetooth status, which can be {@link BluetoothState#STATE_OFF},

节点.功能描述: Get the local device connection state to any profile of any remote device. {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_CONNECTING}, {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_CONNECTED}, {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_DISCONNECTING}.
节点.return_description: One of {@link ProfileConnectionState#STATE_DISCONNECTED},

节点.功能描述: Starts pairing with a remote Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - The address of the remote device to pair.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the pairing process is started; returns {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: The address of the remote device to pair.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the pairing process is started; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the name of a peer Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - The address of the remote device.
@returns { string } Returns the device name in character string format.

parameters.说明: The address of the remote device.

节点.return_description: Returns the device name in character string format.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the class of a peer Bluetooth device.
注释信息: @param { string } deviceId - The address of the remote device.
@returns { DeviceClass } The class of the remote device, {@link DeviceClass}.

parameters.说明: The address of the remote device.

节点.return_description: The class of the remote device, {@link DeviceClass}.

节点.功能描述: Enables Bluetooth on a device.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if Bluetooth is being enabled; returns {@code false} if an error occurs.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if Bluetooth is being enabled; returns {@code false} if an error occurs.

节点.功能描述: Disables Bluetooth on a device.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if Bluetooth is being disabled; returns {@code false} if an error occurs.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if Bluetooth is being disabled; returns {@code false} if an error occurs.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Bluetooth local name of a device.
注释信息: @returns { string } Returns the name the device.
节点.return_description: Returns the name the device.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the list of Bluetooth devices that have been paired with the current device.
注释信息: @returns { Array<string> } Returns a list of paired Bluetooth devices's address.
节点.return_description: Returns a list of paired Bluetooth devices's address.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the connection state of profile.

parameters.说明: The profile id.

节点.return_description: Returns the connection state.

节点.功能描述: Sets the confirmation of pairing with a certain device.
注释信息: @param { string } device - The address of the remote device.
@param { boolean } accept - Indicates whether to accept the pairing request, {@code true} indicates accept or {@code false} otherwise.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the pairing confirmation is set; returns {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: The address of the remote device.
Indicates whether to accept the pairing request, {@code true} indicates accept or {@code false} otherwise.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the pairing confirmation is set; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Sets the Bluetooth friendly name of a device.
注释信息: @param { string } name - Indicates a valid Bluetooth name.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the Bluetooth name is set successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates a valid Bluetooth name.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the Bluetooth name is set successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Sets the Bluetooth scan mode for a device.
注释信息: @param { ScanMode } mode - Indicates the Bluetooth scan mode to set, {@link ScanMode}.
@param { number } duration - Indicates the duration in seconds, in which the host is discoverable.
@returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the Bluetooth scan mode is set; returns {@code false} otherwise.

parameters.说明: Indicates the Bluetooth scan mode to set, {@link ScanMode}.
Indicates the duration in seconds, in which the host is discoverable.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the Bluetooth scan mode is set; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the Bluetooth scanning mode of a device.
注释信息: @returns { ScanMode } Returns the Bluetooth scanning mode, {@link ScanMode}.
节点.return_description: Returns the Bluetooth scanning mode, {@link ScanMode}.

节点.功能描述: Starts scanning Bluetooth devices.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if the scan is started successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the scan is started successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.

节点.功能描述: Stops Bluetooth device scanning.
注释信息: @returns { boolean } Returns {@code true} if scanning is stopped successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.
节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if scanning is stopped successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.

@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - Callback used to return a server socket ID.

parameters.说明: Indicates the service name.
Indicates the listen parameters {@link SppOption}.
Callback used to return a server socket ID.

@param { AsyncCallback<number> } callback - Callback used to return a client socket ID.

parameters.说明: Indicates the server socket ID, returned by {@link sppListen}.
Callback used to return a client socket ID.

Callback used to return a client socket ID.

节点.功能描述: Starts scanning for specified BLE devices with filters. If you do not want to use filter, set this parameter to {@code null}. {@link ScanOptions#interval} set to 0, {@link ScanOptions#dutyMode} set to {@link SCAN_MODE_LOW_POWER} and {@link ScanOptions#matchMode} set to {@link MATCH_MODE_AGGRESSIVE}.
注释信息: @param { Array<ScanFilter> } filters - Indicates the list of filters used to filter out specified devices.
@param { ScanOptions } options - Indicates the parameters for scanning and if the user does not assign a value, the default value will be used.

parameters.说明: Indicates the list of filters used to filter out specified devices.
Indicates the parameters for scanning and if the user does not assign a value, the default value will be used.

节点.功能描述: Stops BLE scanning.

Indicates the advertising data.
Indicates the scan response associated with the advertising data.

The added service and its characteristics are provided by the local device.

节点.功能描述: Closes this {@code GattServer} object and unregisters its callbacks.

This method should be called for every BLE peripheral device that has requested notifications.

parameters.说明: Indicates the address of the BLE peripheral device to receive the notification.
Indicates the local characteristic that has changed.

节点.return_description: Returns {@code true} if the notification is sent successfully; returns {@code false} otherwise.
